summary_markdown:
```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue proposes implementing the Quanta Design System in Plone Volto. The goal is to enhance theming by clearly separating the public theme from the CMS user interface (CMSUI), enabling greater flexibility for developers.

## What needs to be done
Key tasks include implementing the Quanta design system, creating fundamental components, a default theme, and a separation mechanism for public themes and CMSUI. The implementation will require removing the current SemanticUI components from Volto.

## Helpful background
Quanta is designed to refine the appearance and user experience of Volto. Updates also aim to provide more straightforward customization options for developers. Several Figma mockups illustrate the new design, and additional resources include a [talk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fvTMw36YT6A) and [slides](https://www.slideshare.net/sneridagh/meet-quanta-plones-style-guide).

## Good first steps
1. Review the provided [mockups](https://www.figma.com/file/lWRIiKmcy1kMRl1DgLkCSL/Quanta) for design context.
2. Familiarize yourself with the [Quanta Storybook](https://quanta.pastanaga.io/) for component guidance.
3. Join the discussion and ask questions to clarify implementation details and documentation needs.
4. Explore existing issues related to the migration of the theming system.
```
